buddy.hero.title: Your local friend online. Make Beijing easy for you, anytime anywhere.
buddy.hero.description: A 24/7 one-on-one online service for international friends in Beijing, with local university students ready to help in fluent English.
buddy.intro.title: Service Introduction
buddy.intro.subtitle: A local partner who is online whenever you need one
buddy.intro.para1: Local Buddy Online is a 24/7 one-on-one online service tailored for international friends in Beijing, with local university students familiar with the city serving as dedicated online companions. Whether you need travel planning, language assistance, help with daily tasks, or emergency support, we respond within 5 minutes to provide practical tips verified by locals in fluent English, becoming your trusted online companion throughout your stay in Beijing.
buddy.intro.para2: We are here to make Beijing easier to navigate, easier to understand, and easier to enjoy.
buddy.intro.highlight1.label: Service tags
buddy.intro.highlight2.label: Response time
buddy.tags.title: Three service labels
buddy.tags.subtitle: Choose the support that fits your situation
buddy.tags.tag1.title: Basic Consultation
buddy.tags.tag2.title: Customized
buddy.tags.tag2.content: Travel Planning | Exclusive Routes | Pitfall Avoidance Guide
buddy.tags.tag3.title: Friendly Assistance
buddy.background.title: I. Service Background and Introduction
buddy.background.subtitle: Why are we doing this?
buddy.background.para1: In Beijing, whether you're a first-time visitor or a long-term foreign resident, you'll inevitably face moments of confusion: struggling with WeChat Pay, struggling to read Chinese navigation signs, unsure where to find authentic local cuisine, encountering language barriers when handling affairs, or not knowing who to turn to for help in emergencies... While online solutions are often generic, offline assistance rarely arrives promptly. These minor inconveniences can significantly disrupt your time in the city.
buddy.background.para2: Local Buddy Online wants to be your "always-connected local friend in Beijing." We bring together local university students who know Beijing's streets and alleys, understand Chinese and foreign cultures, and speak fluent English. Our 24/7 online service channel means you can find answers and guidance anytime, anywhere, no matter what you need, making your time in Beijing smooth, comfortable, and worry-free.
buddy.background.highlight.label: What can we offer you?
buddy.background.highlight.value: Practical help, fast response, local insight
buddy.offer.items.item1: 7×24-hour dedicated online partners with a 5-minute response target, so you do not have to wait anxiously.
buddy.offer.items.item2: Practical advice verified by locals, instead of generic internet answers, to solve real problems accurately.
buddy.offer.items.item3: Fluent English communication with no language barriers, so even complex issues can be explained clearly.
buddy.offer.items.item4: One-on-one guidance from question answering to full support, helping you handle the small and big things in Beijing step by step.
buddy.offer.items.item5: Online support for emergencies, basic translation, emergency plans, and urgent channels, to keep you covered.
buddy.part2.title: II. Product Features
buddy.part2.subtitle: What's different about it?
buddy.part2.rows.row1.label: 7×24-hour real-time response
buddy.part2.rows.row1.value: Available 24/7, responding to your questions within 5 minutes regardless of day or night, and ready to assist you anytime, anywhere.
buddy.part2.rows.row2.label: Local professional partners
buddy.part2.rows.row2.value: All participants are current university students in Beijing, familiar with the city's streets and alleys, local customs, and administrative procedures, and have undergone professional training and certification through the platform.
buddy.part2.rows.row3.label: Local Practical Tips
buddy.part2.rows.row3.value: Say goodbye to viral travel guides and cookie-cutter answers. We exclusively offer locally verified recommendations featuring authentic destinations, practical methods, and foolproof tips for your journey.
buddy.part2.rows.row4.label: One-on-one exclusive service
buddy.part2.rows.row4.value: Our dedicated online partner will serve you throughout, understanding your needs and circumstances to precisely address your personalized requirements.
buddy.part2.rows.row5.label: Basic services are free
buddy.part2.rows.row5.value: Core consulting services are completely free with no hidden charges, ensuring you can consult without any concerns.
buddy.part2.rows.row6.label: Multimodal communication
buddy.part2.rows.row6.value: Supports text, images, and voice communication. Use whichever method works best for you. For complex issues, send detailed images or voice messages.
buddy.part3.title: III. Service Process
buddy.part3.subtitle: How is online local partner service conducted?
buddy.part3.steps.step1.title: Before consulting
buddy.part3.steps.step1.content: Enter the platform's online service portal and select your preferred service type (Basic Consultation / Travel Planning / Personal Assistance) based on your needs.
buddy.part3.steps.step2.title: Start a consultation
buddy.part3.steps.step2.content: Describe your specific needs and questions in text, images, or voice. You can add relevant details (for example location, time, and preferences).
buddy.part3.steps.step3.title: Match partner
buddy.part3.steps.step3.content: The system instantly matches you with a local online partner to start a one-on-one consultation channel.
buddy.part3.steps.step4.title: Comprehensive guidance
buddy.part3.steps.step4.content: Your partner provides practical advice and step-by-step guidance. Complex issues are explained in detail until you fully understand.
buddy.part3.steps.step5.title: Problem solving
buddy.part3.steps.step5.content: Complete operations as guided by your partner. For further questions, continue consulting in the same channel while your partner follows up throughout.
buddy.part3.steps.step6.title: Service ends
buddy.part3.steps.step6.content: After the issue is resolved, you can rate your partner and leave feedback. Your suggestions help us continuously improve.
buddy.part4.title: IV. Core Service Details
buddy.part4.subtitle: Five core services for everyday and urgent needs in Beijing
buddy.part4.services.a.title: Service A  Basic Consultation: Cultural and Language Guidance
buddy.part4.services.a.topic: Topic: Unlock Beijing culture and basic Chinese to integrate into local life more easily
buddy.part4.services.a.intro: This service addresses essential cultural and language communication needs: from daily Chinese expressions to local customs and taboos, from cultural differences to social etiquette, helping you understand Beijing and adapt faster.
buddy.part4.services.a.items.item1: Basic Chinese phrase guidance for high-frequency scenarios such as transit, ordering food, shopping, and asking for directions, including pronunciation and usage tips.
buddy.part4.services.a.items.item2: Local customs explanation covering Beijing habits, festival culture, and social etiquette to reduce cultural misunderstandings.
buddy.part4.services.a.items.item3: Interpretation of China-foreign cultural differences in daily life, including food, social interactions, and routines.
buddy.part4.services.a.items.item4: Patient answers to any cultural questions, explained in clear and simple language.
buddy.part4.services.a.format: Free basic consultation with instant text or voice responses.
buddy.part4.services.a.audience: First-time visitors to Beijing / International friends who want to understand Chinese culture / Newly arrived international residents.
buddy.part4.services.b.title: Service B  Travel Planning: Personalized Recommendations and Pitfall Avoidance
buddy.part4.services.b.topic: Topic: Customize your Beijing route and avoid common tourist traps
buddy.part4.services.b.intro: Based on your available time, interests, and group size, this service provides personalized route planning, local destination suggestions, booking support, transport guidance, and practical warnings to make your trip more efficient and authentic.
buddy.part4.services.b.items.item1: Customized route design with 1-3 optimal options based on your goals (for example hutong, food, or culture).
buddy.part4.services.b.items.item2: Attraction and destination recommendations focused on locally tested places rather than overhyped spots.
buddy.part4.services.b.items.item3: Practical pitfall avoidance tips, including crowd peaks, spending traps, and ticket booking strategies.
buddy.part4.services.b.items.item4: Transport and ticket guidance including subway, bus, driving routes, booking channels, purchase tips, and discount info.
buddy.part4.services.b.format: Free basic planning, with optional in-depth customized route packs.
buddy.part4.services.b.audience: Visitors traveling in Beijing / International friends who want deeper exploration / Residents who are unsure where to go.
buddy.part4.services.c.title: Service C  Daily Support: Handle Everyday Life in Beijing
buddy.part4.services.c.topic: Topic: One-stop support for daily life to make living in Beijing easier
buddy.part4.services.c.intro: From shopping and ordering food to renting, payments, ride-hailing, and delivery, this service solves day-to-day issues with locally tested tips and step-by-step app guidance.
buddy.part4.services.c.items.item1: Guidance for local apps such as WeChat Pay, Alipay, ride-hailing, food delivery, and navigation, including setup and usage tips.
buddy.part4.services.c.items.item2: Daily spending guidance including local supermarkets, markets, and specialty stores, plus bargaining and ordering tips.
buddy.part4.services.c.items.item3: Food recommendations based on taste preferences, with local restaurant suggestions and ordering guidance.
buddy.part4.services.c.items.item4: Rental and living information, including district-level renting tips, cost references, and convenient service recommendations.
buddy.part4.services.c.format: Free basic guidance with one-on-one follow-up support.
buddy.part4.services.c.audience: International friends living in Beijing long-term / Newcomers in Beijing for work or study.
buddy.part4.services.d.title: Service D  Personal Assistance: End-to-End Guidance for Administrative Tasks
buddy.part4.services.d.topic: Topic: Step-by-step support to complete different tasks in Beijing
buddy.part4.services.d.intro: Whether it is medical visits, paperwork, attraction reservations, or other procedures, this service provides one-on-one text or voice guidance on process steps, required materials, and key precautions.
buddy.part4.services.d.items.item1: Detailed workflow guidance for medical visits, document processing, and venue or attraction reservations.
buddy.part4.services.d.items.item2: Required-material reminders in advance to avoid missing documents and repeated trips.
buddy.part4.services.d.items.item3: Step-by-step online operation support for appointments and applications, with screenshot or voice guidance.
buddy.part4.services.d.items.item4: Medical consultation recommendations including hospital or clinic options, registration channels, procedures, and basic translation support.
buddy.part4.services.d.format: Free basic assistance, with full-process guidance for complex cases.
buddy.part4.services.d.audience: All international friends in Beijing who need help handling procedures.
buddy.part4.services.e.title: Service E  Emergency Support: Your Online Emergency Backup
buddy.part4.services.e.topic: Topic: Stay calm in emergencies with rapid online help
buddy.part4.services.e.intro: When unexpected situations happen, you can reach us immediately for basic translation, emergency suggestions, and local emergency contact guidance to support your safety in Beijing.
buddy.part4.services.e.items.item1: Basic online Chinese-English translation to help communication with locals during emergencies.
buddy.part4.services.e.items.item2: Emergency response suggestions for getting lost, losing belongings, or sudden physical discomfort.
buddy.part4.services.e.items.item3: Emergency contact guidance, including local emergency numbers, venue hotlines, and foreign-service channels.
buddy.part4.services.e.items.item4: Continuous follow-up support until the emergency issue is resolved.
buddy.part4.services.e.format: 24/7 free emergency support with rapid response within 5 minutes.
buddy.part4.services.e.audience: All international friends staying in Beijing.
buddy.part5.title: V. Purpose and Design Philosophy
buddy.part5.subtitle: Why this service is designed this way
buddy.part5.para1: Local Buddy Online has one core intention: every international friend in Beijing should have an always-online local friend, so the city no longer feels unfamiliar.
buddy.part5.para2: Most pain points are not major incidents but constant small frictions, such as payment, navigation, and process uncertainty. These are hard to solve with generic online answers and rarely supported in real time offline, yet they strongly affect the Beijing experience.
buddy.part5.para3: Our 24/7 online partner model addresses both speed and precision. Local university partners understand Beijing, culture, and cross-language communication. With five-minute response targets and multimodal communication, users can quickly find someone to ask and move forward with confidence.
buddy.part6.title: VI. Cost Information
buddy.part6.subtitle: Clear pricing by support type and service depth
buddy.part6.rows.row1.label: Basic Consultation / Emergency Assistance
buddy.part6.rows.row2.label: Travel Planning / Daily Support
buddy.part6.rows.row2.value: Free basic services with deep customization: ¥58-98 per session
buddy.part6.rows.row3.label: Friendly assistance
buddy.part6.rows.row3.value: Free basic guidance with full-process support for complex matters ¥68-128 per session
buddy.part6.rows.row4.label: Exclusive long-term partner
buddy.part6.rows.row4.value: ¥198/month, with dedicated partners providing full-service support and unlimited consultations
buddy.part6.rows.row5.label: Group Custom Services
buddy.part6.rows.row5.value: Customize exclusive online service solutions for foreign teams/businesses. Pricing is negotiable.
buddy.part6.rows.row6.label: include
buddy.part6.rows.row6.value: One-on-one dedicated guidance / Practical advice from locals / Multiple formats for instant communication / Full-process follow-up on issues
buddy.part6.rows.row7.label: free from
buddy.part6.rows.row7.value: Off-site service fees / Actual expenses (e.g., admission tickets, taxi fares) / Express delivery / Postal fees
buddy.part7.title: VII. Purchase Guidelines
buddy.part7.subtitle: Read carefully before registering
buddy.part7.items.item1: This service provides online one-on-one consultation services and does not offer offline proxy services, administrative assistance, or accompanying services.
buddy.part7.items.item2: Basic consultation and emergency assistance are free with no hidden charges. In-depth customization and full-process follow-up are charged per session with transparent pricing.
buddy.part7.items.item3: When initiating a consultation, please describe your issue in detail (for example location, time, and preferences) so partners can respond accurately.
buddy.part7.items.item4: Partners provide practical advice verified by locals. Final decisions and operations are made by you, and the platform does not assume related liability.
buddy.part7.items.item5: Emergency assistance is basic online guidance. For major emergencies (such as personal safety incidents or sudden illness), please call local emergency numbers first.
buddy.part7.items.item6: Please respect your online partner and communicate politely during consultation. Do not raise irrelevant or unreasonable requests.
buddy.part8.title: VIII. Service Usage Process
buddy.part8.subtitle: Enable online local partner services in three steps
buddy.part8.steps.step1.title: Step 1  Enter the service portal
buddy.part8.steps.step1.content: Open the platform's online service section and select your preferred service type (basic consultation, travel planning, personalized assistance, or emergency support) based on your needs.
buddy.part8.steps.step2.title: Step 2  Describe your requirements
buddy.part8.steps.step2.content: Describe your issue and requirements in detail using text, images, or voice. Add relevant details and click Start Consultation.
buddy.part8.steps.step3.title: Step 3  Enable one-on-one service
buddy.part8.steps.step3.content: The system instantly matches your local online partner and initiates one-on-one consultation within 5 minutes. Your partner will guide you until questions are resolved.
buddy.part9.title: IX. Contact Information
buddy.part9.subtitle: How to reach us
buddy.part9.rows.row1.label: Online partner exclusive consultation portal
buddy.part9.rows.row2.label: Service Complaints/Suggestions Email
buddy.part9.rows.row3.label: Reply time
buddy.part9.rows.row3.value: Reply within 48 working hours (extended on weekends and holidays)
buddy.part9.rows.row4.label: Emergency alert
buddy.part9.rows.row4.value: For major emergencies, please dial Beijing local emergency numbers directly: 110 (police), 120 (emergency medical services), 119 (fire department).
buddy.part9.note: For customized long-term partner services or tailored solutions for foreign teams and businesses, please contact us by email. We will design a bespoke service plan for you.
